common.questions_reply: Have questions? Reply to this email and we’ll help you.
common.ignore_if_not_requested: If you didn’t request this, you can safely ignore this message.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password — Qvicko
password_reset.heading: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. Click the button below to choose a new password. The link is valid for 30 minutes.

verification.subject: Verify your email address — Qvicko
verification.heading: Verify your email address
verification.body: Thank you for creating an account with Qvicko! Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verification.ignore: If you didn’t create an account, you can safely ignore this message.

site_published.subject: Your website is live — {business_name}
site_published.heading: Your website is live!
site_published.body: Congratulations! The website for {business_name} is now published and available to visitors.
site_published.trial_info: Free for 30 days — your website is free for the first 30 days. To keep it after that, you need to add a payment method. If no payment is registered, the website will be removed after 45 days.
site_published.dashboard_text: Log in to {link_start}your account{link_end} to manage the website, connect a custom domain, or add a payment method.

trial_ending.subject: Your free period expires in {days_left} days — {business_name}
trial_ending.heading: Your free period is ending soon
trial_ending.body: The free period for {business_name} expires in {days_left} days. To keep your website available, you need to add a payment method.
trial_ending.info: If no payment method is added within 30 days of publishing, the website will be paused. After an additional 15 days, it will be permanently deleted.

site_paused.subject: Your website has been paused — {business_name}
site_paused.heading: Your website has been paused
site_paused.body: The free period for {business_name} has expired. Your website is no longer visible to visitors.
site_paused.info: The website will be deleted in {days_until_deletion} days. Add a payment method before then to reactivate it.

site_deletion_warning.subject: Last chance — your website will be deleted in {days_until_deletion} days
site_deletion_warning.heading: Your website will be deleted soon
site_deletion_warning.body: The website for {business_name} will be permanently deleted in {days_until_deletion} days if no payment method is added.
site_deletion_warning.warning: This cannot be undone. When the website is deleted, all content, domain connections, and statistics will be lost.

site_deleted.subject: Your website has been deleted — {business_name}
site_deleted.heading: Your website has been deleted
site_deleted.body: The website for {business_name} has been deleted because no payment method was added within the deadline.
site_deleted.content_removed: All content, domain connections, and statistics have been permanently removed.
site_deleted.welcome_back: If you’d like a new website in the future, you’re always welcome back. Get in touch and we’ll help you!

payment_method_added.subject: Payment method added — {business_name}
payment_method_added.heading: Payment method added!
payment_method_added.body: A payment method has been added to the website for {business_name}. Your website is now secured and will continue to be available.
payment_method_added.info: You can change your payment method or view your billing at any time in the dashboard.

ticket_created.subject: We’ve received your ticket — Qvicko
ticket_created.heading: We’ve received your ticket
ticket_created.body: Thank you for contacting us! We’ve received your ticket and will get back to you as soon as possible.
ticket_created.follow_status: You can follow the status of your ticket in your dashboard.

ticket_replied.subject: New reply on your ticket — {ticket_subject}
ticket_replied.heading: You’ve received a reply
ticket_replied.conversation_note: You can read the full conversation in your dashboard.

site_deletion_confirm.subject: Confirm deletion of {site_name}
site_deletion_confirm.heading: Confirm deletion
site_deletion_confirm.body: You have requested to delete the website {site_name}.
site_deletion_confirm.warning: This action cannot be undone. The website will be hidden from all visitors and all connected domains will be removed. Click the button below to confirm the deletion. The link is valid for 24 hours.
site_deletion_confirm.ignore: If you didn’t request this deletion, you can safely ignore this message.

booking_owner.subject: New booking from {customer_name} — {site_name}
booking_owner.heading: New booking received
booking_owner.body: A new booking has been submitted via {site_name}.
booking_owner.manage_note: Log in to your dashboard to confirm or manage the booking.

booking_customer_confirm.subject: Booking confirmation — {site_name}
booking_customer_confirm.heading: Thank you for your booking!
booking_customer_confirm.body: We have received your booking at {site_name}. You will receive a confirmation once the booking has been approved.
booking_customer_confirm.info: You will be notified by email when your booking has been confirmed.
booking_customer_confirm.footer: This email was sent on behalf of {site_name} via Qvicko.

booking_confirmed.subject: Your booking is confirmed — {site_name}
booking_confirmed.heading: Booking confirmed!
booking_confirmed.body: Your booking at {site_name} has been confirmed.
booking_confirmed.info: Please arrive on time. If you have any questions or need to make changes, contact us directly.
booking_confirmed.footer: This email was sent on behalf of {site_name} via Qvicko.

booking_cancelled.subject: Your booking has been cancelled — {site_name}
booking_cancelled.heading: Booking cancelled
booking_cancelled.body: Your booking at {site_name} has unfortunately been cancelled.
booking_cancelled.contact_note: Contact {site_name} directly if you have questions or would like to book a new time.

booking_completed.subject: Booking completed — {site_name}
booking_completed.heading: Thank you for your visit!
booking_completed.body: Your booking at {site_name} has been marked as completed.
booking_completed.thanks: Thank you for choosing {site_name}. We hope you were satisfied!

booking_payment_received.subject: Payment received — {site_name}
booking_payment_received.heading: Payment confirmed
booking_payment_received.body: We have received your payment for the booking at {site_name}.
booking_payment_received.info: The payment has been registered and confirmed. No further action is needed.
booking_payment_received.footer: This email was sent on behalf of {site_name} via Qvicko.

booking_payment_failed.subject: Payment failed — {site_name}
booking_payment_failed.heading: Payment could not be processed
booking_payment_failed.body: The payment for your booking at {site_name} could not be processed.
booking_payment_failed.warning: Please check that your card details are correct and that you have sufficient funds. Then try again.

payout_initiated.subject: Payout initiated — {amount}
payout_initiated.heading: Payout on its way
payout_initiated.body: A payout of {amount} from {site_name} has been initiated to your bank account.
payout_initiated.arrival_info: Estimated arrival: {estimated_arrival}. Please note it may take 1–2 business days.
payout_initiated.note: Payouts are processed automatically via Stripe Connect based on your payout schedule.

payout_completed.subject: Payout completed — {amount}
payout_completed.heading: Payout completed!
payout_completed.body: The payout of {amount} from {site_name} has reached your bank account.
payout_completed.info: The amount should now be visible on your bank statement. If you don’t see it within 24 hours, contact your bank.

payout_failed.subject: Payout failed — {amount}
payout_failed.heading: Payout failed
payout_failed.body: The payout of {amount} from {site_name} could not be completed.
payout_failed.warning: Please verify that your bank details in Stripe are correct. Stripe will automatically retry.

chargeback_received.subject: Dispute received — {amount}
chargeback_received.heading: A dispute has been filed
chargeback_received.body: A customer has filed a dispute (chargeback) regarding a payment from {site_name}.
chargeback_received.warning: A dispute of {amount} has been opened by customer {customer_name}.
chargeback_received.action_info: Disputes must be responded to before the deadline. Gather evidence such as booking confirmation, communication with the customer, and proof of delivery. If the dispute is lost, the amount will be deducted from your balance.

negative_balance_warning.subject: Warning: Negative balance on your account
negative_balance_warning.heading: Negative balance
negative_balance_warning.body: The account connected to {site_name} has a negative balance of {balance}. This may be due to refunds or disputes.
negative_balance_warning.warning: The negative balance must be covered. Incoming earnings will be used to cover the debt. If not covered, Stripe may debit your bank account.
negative_balance_warning.info: To resolve this, you can wait for incoming payments which will automatically offset the debt, or contact us for assistance.

negative_balance_overdue.subject: Important: Outstanding balance {balance}
negative_balance_overdue.heading: Outstanding balance requires action
negative_balance_overdue.body: The account connected to {site_name} has had a negative balance of {balance} for {days_negative} days.
negative_balance_overdue.warning: Please settle the outstanding amount immediately. If the balance is not resolved, Stripe may take action such as debiting your bank account or restricting your account.
negative_balance_overdue.action_info: Contact us immediately if you cannot settle the amount. We’ll help you find a solution.

contact_owner.subject: New message from {visitor_name} — {site_name}
contact_owner.heading: New contact form submission
contact_owner.body: Someone has sent a message through the contact form on {site_name}.
contact_owner.reply_note: Reply directly to {email} to continue the conversation.

contact_visitor.subject: We’ve received your message — {site_name}
contact_visitor.heading: Thank you for your message!
contact_visitor.body: Thank you for contacting {site_name}. We have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_visitor.info: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact_visitor.footer: This email was sent on behalf of {site_name} via Qvicko.
